summary: Completed end-to-end frontend testing of the Ultimate Champions League Draft Builder. All 14 critical checks passed: Home -> Formation -> Draft (11 picks, dice roll, change mechanic with 0/3 disable) -> Tactics (OVR=83, all 3 tactic cards) -> Tournament (8 groups A-H, user matches triggered modal, scoreboard/ticker/FULL-TIME/close all work) -> Sound toggle SES/SESSIZ -> Reset returns to home. All data-testids matched the spec. Found one non-blocking HTML hydration warning (nested buttons).
action_items: (Minor / non-blocking) Fix invalid HTML: <button> nested inside <motion.button>. FormationScreen renders <Pitch> (which contains <button data-testid='pitch-slot-N'>) inside a <motion.button data-testid='formation-...'>. React logs hydration warning 'In HTML, <button> cannot be a descendant of <button>'. Consider changing the formation card outer element to <div role='button'> or removing slot buttons from preview Pitch.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js handleContinue uses initial?.screen captured at mount; this is fine for resume but won't reflect later saves. Acceptable for single-session use.
TournamentScreen useEffect depends on userStats reference; since computed via useMemo in App, it's stable until xi/formation change - good.
MatchScreen ticker delay is fixed 400ms per event regardless of minute - acceptable for MVP, may want to scale by minute spacing.
Hydration warning from nested buttons (FormationScreen + Pitch) - should be fixed but does not break functionality.
localStorage SAVE_KEY persistence works correctly; reset properly clears state.
seed_data_creation: none - app is frontend-only with bundled JS data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full end-to-end flow validated: home -> formation(4-3-3) -> draft (11 picks, change disabled at 0/3) -> tactics (GEGENPRESS) -> tournament (8 groups, played all 6 matchdays, user team appeared in group H, match modal worked each time) -> sound toggle -> reset. data-testids confirmed: start-draft-button, formation-{4-3-3|4-2-3-1|4-4-2|3-5-2|5-3-2}, formation-continue-button, roll-dice-button, change-button, changes-remaining, pool-player-N, rolled-team-name, tactic-{GEGENPRESS|TIKI_TAKA|PARK_THE_BUS}, tactics-continue-button, team-overall, play-matchday-button, match-modal, scoreboard, home-name, away-name, match-event-N, close-match-button, sound-toggle-button, reset-button. Did NOT exhaustively test r16/qf/sf/final stages — only group stage played fully; recommend retest if knockout-stage bugs reported.
rca of the issue: No bugs found requiring RCA. Hydration warning RCA: motion.button in FormationScreen wraps a Pitch component which itself renders <button data-testid='pitch-slot-N'>. Browser rejects nested interactive buttons; React warns. Fix: replace outer motion.button with motion.div + onClick + role='button' or strip the slot buttons in preview mode.
